=== bd96-06-24-zimmy21-LB-1397.txt
===================
===================
===================
LB-1397, (55min+50min), Audience recording., This is NOT the bootleg ' You may call me zimmy' ., Size : 555 Mb., Sony Dat-Recorder TCD-D8 > AKG Stereo Mics > Pioneer CD -Recorder; excellent sound; a little background talking d1t1. d1t7 (a bittorrent from 11/06 added this is a zimmy21 recording)

Disc 01 01. Down in the flood, 02. Lay lady lay, 03. All along the watchtower, 04. Positively 4th street, 05. Most likely you go your way, 06. Silvio, 07. Visions of Johanna, 08. Masters of war, Disc 02 :, 01. It's all over now, Baby Blue, 02. God knows, 03. Ring them bells, 04. Seven days, 05. New Minglewood blues, 06. Blowin' in the wind, 07. Rainy day women # 12 & 35 


Please retain this info file and its LB number as a marker for this lossless set
and if you spread it please list it in the description to avoid others getting duplicates
.
===================
===================
===================
=== Dylan Differdange 1996.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
24  june 1996
Differdange - Luxembourg

A zimmy21 recording / Re-seed

Sound quality : excellent
Check out  samples .

Source : AKG Stereo Mics > Dat Sony TCD-D7 > Pioneer CD > EAC > Wav > Flac Frontend > Flac

Size :  522 Mb

Disc 01  : 54.54  minutes

01. Down in the flood - 5.17 min.
02. Lay lady lay - 4.53 min.
03. All along the watchtower - 6.10 min.
04. Positively 4th street - 9.08 min.
05. Most likely you go your way - 7.15 min.
06. Silvio - 7.07 min.
07. Visions of Johanna - 8.15 min.
08. Masters of war -  6.11 min.

Disc 02 : 49.46  minutes

01. It's all over now, baby blue - 8.58 min.
02. God knows - 4.56 min.
03. Ring them bells - 6.45 min.
04. Seven days - 7.15 min.
05. New Minglewood blues - 6.11 min.
06. Blowin' in the wind - 8.27 min.
07. Rainy day women # 12 & 35 - 7.10 min.

Not for sale !!! 
Trading only  !!!
